pullRequest.title: Refresh Codex app-server bindings for 0.136.0
pullRequest.body:
## Generated Update

Source: openai/codex 0.136.0
Release URL: https://github.com/openai/codex/releases/tag/rust-v0.136.0
Codex before: codex-cli 0.136.0
Codex after: codex-cli 0.136.0
Update actions: none
Target repo: /tmp/codex-toys-openai-codex-0BHwBi/codex-toys
Code branch: `codex/openai-codex-bindings/rust-v0.136.0`
Thread state branch: `thread/openai-codex-bindings/rust-v0.136.0`
Changed files: packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/ClientRequest.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/McpServerInfo.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/index.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/ConfigRequirements.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/McpServerStatus.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/NetworkUnixSocketPermission.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/SkillsExtraRootsSetParams.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/SkillsExtraRootsSetResponse.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/ThreadItem.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/ThreadResumeInitialTurnsPageParams.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/ThreadResumeParams.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/ThreadResumeResponse.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/TurnStartParams.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/TurnSteerParams.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/TurnsPage.ts, packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/index.ts

## Validation

- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`: passed
- `pnpm --filter @codex-toys/bridge check:types`: passed
- `pnpm --filter @codex-toys/bridge build`: passed
- `pnpm --filter codex-toys check:types`: passed
- `pnpm --filter codex-toys test`: passed
- `pnpm --filter codex-toys smoke:exports`: passed

## Diff Stat

```text
packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/ClientRequest.ts          | 3 ++-
 packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/index.ts                  | 3 ++-
 packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/ConfigRequirements.ts  | 3 ++-
 packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/McpServerStatus.ts     | 3 ++-
 .../src/app-server/generated/v2/NetworkUnixSocketPermission.ts     | 2 +-
 packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/ThreadItem.ts          | 2 +-
 packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/ThreadResumeParams.ts  | 6 ++++++
 .../bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/ThreadResumeResponse.ts     | 7 ++++++-
 packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/TurnStartParams.ts     | 2 +-
 packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/TurnSteerParams.ts     | 2 +-
 packages/bridge/src/app-server/generated/v2/index.ts               | 4 ++++
 11 files changed, 28 insertions(+), 9 deletions(-)
```

## Codex Analysis

**Findings:** None from the supplied diff.

The changes match the Codex 0.136.0 app-server protocol surface I checked upstream: `thread/resume.initialTurnsPage`, MCP `serverInfo`, `skills/extraRoots/set`, Windows sandbox requirements, `clientUserMessageId`, and Unix socket `"deny"` all line up with the release notes and tagged Rust protocol definitions. The nullable/optional shapes also look intentional for ts-rs output.

**Residual Risk:** I could not run local `rg` or TypeScript build checks because the managed sandbox failed before shell commands executed (`bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR`). I also couldn’t directly compare the new file contents that were listed but not shown in the diff. Sources checked: Codex 0.136.0 release and upstream PR/source context for the protocol changes.

<!-- codex-toys:openai-codex-bindings release=rust-v0.136.0 -->
